CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2024 Set For Trial On Jan-27-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2024 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Atty. NATASHA KADER, Esq. of Pierce Kavcioglu Espinosa & Cesar LLP ( 818-728-4999) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT SKANSKA USA BUILDING INC.'s DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's demurrer to the complaint is overruled.

Plaintiff was a building project's general contractor; defendant, a subcontractor. The complaint says the parties settled their disputes over the project, but plaintiff overpaid defendant due to billing error.

For the pleading stage, the complaint adequately alleges causes of action for breach of contract and a common count. (Id. at 3:21-5:8.) "The hearing on demurrer may not be turned into a contested evidentiary hearing through the guise of having the court take judicial notice of documents whose truthfulness or proper interpretation are disputable." (Joslin v. H.A.S. Ins. Brokerage (1986) 184 Cal.App.3d 369, 374.) Judicial notice is thus denied.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
